info.name: Paystack Customers API
info.description:
Create, list, and manage customer profiles on your integration. Whitelist or blacklist customers, deactivate authorizations, and validate customers with KYC data.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paystack Support
 Email: support@paystack.com

urlencoded.description: (Required) Two-letter country code of identification issuer
(Required) You can get the list of bank codes by calling the List Banks endpoint (https://api.paystack.co/bank).
Customer's identification number. Required if type is bvn
